parents.subject: LU-13131 osc: Make sure we don't accidentally deprioritize extents

commit.subject: LU-12477 kernel: remove dev_read_only handling
commit.message:
LU-12477 kernel: remove dev_read_only handling

To test disk failures Lustre developed a method for ldiskfs to
make the backend block device appears to have failed. Modern
kernels offer the same thing with dm-flakey. Lustre has moved
to dm-flakey for some time so the old dev_read_only can now be
removed.

Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
LU-12477 kernel: remove dev_read_only handling

To test disk failures Lustre developed a method for ldiskfs to
make the backend block device appears to have failed. Modern
kernels offer the same thing with dm-flakey. Lustre has moved
to dm-flakey for some time so the old dev_read_only can now be
removed.

Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.orgLU-12477 kernel: remove dev_read_only handling

To test disk failures Lustre developed a method for ldiskfs to
make the backend block device appears to have failed. Modern
kernels offer the same thing with dm-flakey. Lustre has moved
to dm-flakey for some time so the old dev_read_only can now be
removed.

Change-Id: I8df4f6de9312878ef81276495f6befcf745a360c
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>>
